visa_types.name: Temporary Visitor Visa For Tourism (Sightseeing or Transit)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees (Effective 01st April 2026 to 31st March 2027)

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa For Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Note:
- Visa fee can be paid by cash. All other VFS charges can be paid by cash/ card.
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.

- Refund of Visa Fee: The applicant can collect the Visa fee (if visa is not approved by the Embassy) at the time of passport collection.
For intake centres:
Applicant must enclose two separate bank demand drafts drawn in the name of “VFS Lanka (Pvt) Limited” payable at Colombo for visa fee and service/ courier fee. For each applicant, there will be a separate Demand Draft for Visa fee and service/two way courier charge.
Demand Draft 1 (Visa Fee)- LKR 6000
This demand draft shall be for applicable for the visa fee as per the visa category.
Demand Draft 2 (Service charge/ Courier charge)- LKR 7,700
This demand draft shall be for the service charge (LKR 5000/) and mandatory courier charge (LKR 2,200/) which shall be a total of LKR 7,700/- per application.
Fees are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
It takes usually five (05) working days excluding
                                                                        the date of submission. Please make sure to
                                                                        apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In
                                                                        addition there are some cases which may take
                                                                        longer processing period depending on the
                                                                        individual circumstances.
Please Note: - 
Please note that this is an indicative processing
                                                                        time only. Processing time may increase or
                                                                        decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental
                                                                        task of visa processing and does not play any
                                                                        role in processing the visa application as this
                                                                        is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.

Schedule of Stay (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64BtIepvZSTWU2xxji51tS/457a54b430eb5b3f2ee643ed03444102/itinerary-in-japan.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.
Applicants transiting through Japan are required to apply under the Temporary Visitor Visa (Tourism-Sightseeing) category and must obtain either a single-entry visa or a multiple-entry visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for a holiday or recreation for a stay up to 90 days.
Applicants transiting through Japan are required to apply under the Temporary Visitor Visa (Tourism-Sightseeing) category and must obtain either a single-entry visa or a multiple-entry visa.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees (Effective 01st April 2026 to 31st March 2027)

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa For Tourism (Sightseeing)]
Note:
- Visa fee can be paid by cash. All other VFS charges can be paid by cash/ card.
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.

- Refund of Visa Fee: The applicant can collect the Visa fee (if visa is not approved by the Embassy) at the time of passport collection.
For intake centres:
Applicant must enclose two separate bank demand drafts drawn in the name of “VFS Lanka (Pvt) Limited” payable at Colombo for visa fee and service/ courier fee. For each applicant, there will be a separate Demand Draft for Visa fee and service/two way courier charge.
Demand Draft 1 (Visa Fee)- LKR 6000
This demand draft shall be for applicable for the visa fee as per the visa category.
Demand Draft 2 (Service charge/ Courier charge)- LKR 7,700
This demand draft shall be for the service charge (LKR 5000/) and mandatory courier charge (LKR 2,200/) which shall be a total of LKR 7,700/- per application.
Fees are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.

## Documents Required
 Document Checklist             

## 
Note: Kindly arrange the
                                                                        documents in the same order as outlined in
                                                                        Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along
                                                                        with your visa application for 
Copy should be good-quality, clear to read.
                                                                        Please bring the documents printed in high
                                                                        density.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be
                                                                        on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
Please download the below specification for the photograph and submit physical photograph along with your visa application base on the given specification.
Required  photograph Size For JP visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1QmmbrTthuJw07DmK3ZBVu/18f00a6822a47a590af750ba0757862e/Required-photograph-Size-For-JP-visa.pdf)
PHOTO SPECIFICATIONS (for the Individual Card Number Form)
Please download the below specification for the photograph and submit physical photograph with  the Individual Card Number Form (please do not fill in the form).
Required  photograph Size For JP visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1QmmbrTthuJw07DmK3ZBVu/18f00a6822a47a590af750ba0757862e/Required-photograph-Size-For-JP-visa.pdf)

## Processing Time
It takes usually five (05) working days excluding
                                                                        the date of submission. Please make sure to
                                                                        apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In
                                                                        addition there are some cases which may take
                                                                        longer processing period depending on the
                                                                        individual circumstances.
Please Note: - 
Please note that this is an indicative processing
                                                                        time only. Processing time may increase or
                                                                        decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental
                                                                        task of visa processing and does not play any
                                                                        role in processing the visa application as this
                                                                        is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa Application form along with your application
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/58hby0jjEDauB6Fwqk2TGd/204d95ce88e052b781f5aa3c7c49b345/Visa-Application-Form.pdf)
List of Visa Applicants  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2OucDbjKaUnFUQmyo5cv8G/32364be999d704af697608872bbba226/list-of-visa-applicants.pdf)
Schedule of Stay (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64BtIepvZSTWU2xxji51tS/457a54b430eb5b3f2ee643ed03444102/itinerary-in-japan.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A stay during which the applicant performs
                                                                        remunerative work (professor, journalist,
                                                                        researcher, engineer etc.) in Japan or a stay of
                                                                        over 90 days (student, trainee, etc.) in Japan.
                                                                        Please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/long/index.html)
                                                                        for more details.
The Certificate
                                                                            of Eligibility (http://www.immi-moj.go.jp/english/tetuduki/kanri/shyorui/01.html) issued by the Immigration
                                                                        Bureau of Japan must be submitted to apply this
                                                                        category.
- Procedures Chart for
                                                                                Work or Long-Term Stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/process/long.html)
- Persons
                                                                                who leave Japan and wish to re-enter
                                                                                Japan (http://www.mofa.go.jp/ca/fna/page22e_000694.html)
- COE
                                                                                Validity 26-07-2022 Update (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2c3N0pXpCiU18hbTFUVBgn/98b244d51fba54b290ff2f76c4577579/coe-validity-26-07-2022-update.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Visa for “Medical Stay” is a visa issued to
                                                                        foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for
                                                                        medical purposes (including medical check-ups).
                                                                        The visa is issued to their accompanying
                                                                        person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
                                                                    
Applicants must get the confirmation from the
                                                                        medical institution by the qualified guarantor
                                                                        agency. Consultation report which is issued by
                                                                        medical institution as well as the guarantor
                                                                        letter and treatment schedule by the qualified
                                                                        guarantor agency may be requested.
Additionally recommendation letter from a Sri
                                                                        Lankan local doctor with the previous medical
                                                                        reports is required.
If the treatment period requires staying more
                                                                        than 180 days, please apply with the Certificate
                                                                        of Eligibility.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Visa for “Medical Stay” is a visa issued to
                                                                        foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for
                                                                        medical purposes (including medical check-ups).
                                                                        The visa is issued to their accompanying
                                                                        person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
                                                                    
Applicants must get the confirmation from the
                                                                        medical institution by the qualified guarantor
                                                                        agency. Consultation report which is issued by
                                                                        medical institution as well as the guarantor
                                                                        letter and treatment schedule by the qualified
                                                                        guarantor agency may be requested.
Additionally recommendation letter from a Sri
                                                                        Lankan local doctor with the previous medical
                                                                        reports is required.
If the treatment period requires staying more
                                                                        than 180 days, please apply with the Certificate
                                                                        of Eligibility.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees (Effective 01st April 2026 to 31st March 2027)

[Table:Medical Stay Visa]

Note:
- Visa fee can be paid by cash. All other VFS charges can be paid by cash/ card.
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: The applicant can collect the Visa fee (if visa is not approved by the Embassy) at the time of passport collection.
For intake centres: 
Applicant must enclose two separate bank
                                                                            demand drafts drawn in the name of
                                                                        “VFS Lanka (Pvt) Limited” payable at
                                                                        Colombo for visa fee and service/ courier fee.
                                                                        For each applicant, there will be a separate
                                                                        Demand Draft for Visa fee and service/two way
                                                                        courier charge.
Demand Draft 1 (Visa Fee)- LKR 7140
This demand draft shall be for applicable for the
                                                                        visa fee as per the visa category.
Demand Draft 2 (Service charge/ Courier charge)-
                                                                        LKR 6,355
This demand draft shall be for the service charge
                                                                        (LKR 4375/) and mandatory courier charge (LKR
                                                                        1,980/) which shall be a total of LKR 6,355/- per
                                                                        application.
Fees are inclusive of all taxes and
                                                                        non-refundable. 

## Documents Required
Document  Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1OPaxLkwzug6qanqURRzTs/c6667307c5900778f5b7bd879eae1510/medical-visa-documents-requisition-checklist_new.pdf)                                                                 

Note: Kindly arrange the
                                                                        documents in the same order as outlined in
                                                                        Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along
                                                                        with your visa application for 
Copy should be good-quality, clear to read.
                                                                        Please bring the documents printed in high
                                                                        density.
Important-Please note all photocopies should be
                                                                        on A4 size only

## Photo Specifications
Please download the below specification for the
                                                                        photograph and submit physical photograph along
                                                                        with your visa application base on the given
                                                                        specification.

Required  photograph Size For JP visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1QmmbrTthuJw07DmK3ZBVu/18f00a6822a47a590af750ba0757862e/Required-photograph-Size-For-JP-visa.pdf)
PHOTO SPECIFICATIONS (for the Individual Card Number Form)
Please download the below specification for the photograph and submit physical photograph with  the Individual Card Number Form (please do not fill in the form).
Required  photograph Size For JP visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1QmmbrTthuJw07DmK3ZBVu/18f00a6822a47a590af750ba0757862e/Required-photograph-Size-For-JP-visa.pdf)

## Processing Time
It takes usually five (05) working days excluding
                                                                        the date of submission. Please make sure to
                                                                        apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In
                                                                        addition there are some cases which may take
                                                                        longer processing period depending on the
                                                                        individual circumstances.
Please Note: - 
Please note that this is an indicative processing
                                                                        time only. Processing time may increase or
                                                                        decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental
                                                                        task of visa processing and does not play any
                                                                        role in processing the visa application as this
                                                                        is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of
                                                                        Japan, Colombo.

## Download Forms
Please submit one completed and signed Visa
                                                                        Application form along with your application
Visa  Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/58hby0jjEDauB6Fwqk2TGd/204d95ce88e052b781f5aa3c7c49b345/Visa-Application-Form.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Transit Visa is issued when the purpose of travel
                                                                        to Japan is only for transit on the way to/from
                                                                        other countries. Activities are limited to
                                                                        sightseeing, leisure and rest. If the purpose is
                                                                        commercial or visiting friends/relatives in
                                                                        Japan, please apply Short-Term Visa
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Transit Visa is issued when the purpose of travel
                                                                        to Japan is only for transit on the way to/from
                                                                        other countries. Activities are limited to
                                                                        sightseeing, leisure and rest. If the purpose is
                                                                        commercial or visiting friends/relatives in
                                                                        Japan, please apply Short-Term Visa

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows business people to make multiple
                                                                        short business visit to Japan for up to 90 days
                                                                        during your visa validity period. Business
                                                                        activities may include a conference, negotiation
                                                                        or exploratory business visit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows business people to make multiple
                                                                        short business visit to Japan for up to 90 days
                                                                        during your visa validity period. Business
                                                                        activities may include a conference, negotiation
                                                                        or exploratory business visit.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees (Effective 01st April 2026 to 31st March 2027)

[Table:Non Profit Business Affairs, Cultural and Sports Exchange, Etc]

Note:
- Visa fee can be paid by cash. All other VFS charges can be paid by cash/ card.
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy.
Refund of Visa Fee: The applicant can collect the Visa fee (if visa is not approved by the Embassy) at the time of passport collection.

Demand Draft 1 (Visa Fee)- LKR 6000
This demand draft shall be for applicable for the visa fee as per the visa category.
Demand Draft 2 (Service charge/ Courier charge)- LKR 7,700
